---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / motivation

Describe the problem this feature solves, or the use case it enables. Why is this needed?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen. Include any API surface changes, new configuration options, or UI changes.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why were they rejected?

## Affected component(s)

- [ ] backend/core (trust engine)
- [ ] backend/auth (authentication)
- [ ] backend/connectors (analytics / reports)
- [ ] frontend (dashboard)
- [ ] sdk (Python SDK)
- [ ] documentation

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or references that might be helpful.
